CREATE.TITLE: Create WhatsApp API campaign
CREATE.DESCRIPTION: Use text, media, or text with media. Supported variables are fixed to avoid manual mapping.

GUIDE.INBOX_BODY: The inbox must be API and marked as WhatsApp API.
GUIDE.MESSAGE_BODY: Templates store text only; media is saved in the campaign snapshot.
GUIDE.SEND_BODY: Audience uses the same label selector as existing campaigns.

VARIABLES.TITLE: Supported variables

EMAIL_SENDER.DESCRIPTION: Verify your sending domain once so email campaigns are delivered with your own brand and pass SPF, DKIM and DMARC checks.

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No sending domains yet
EMPTY_STATE.SUBTITLE: Add your domain to generate the DNS records you need to paste at your registrar.

ACTIONS.DELETE_IN_USE: This domain is used by a campaign. Delete those campaigns first.
ACTIONS.ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

DNS.TITLE: DNS records
DNS.SUBTITLE: Add these records at your domain registrar. Verification can take a few minutes after they propagate.
DNS.WHAT_IS: DNS is where your domain's settings live. These records prove to Gmail and Outlook that the email is really yours. Without them, your campaign goes to spam or gets rejected.
DNS.GUIDE_TITLE: How to do it, step by step:
DNS.GUIDE_STEP_1: Open the panel where your domain is hosted (Hostinger, GoDaddy, Cloudflare, etc.).
DNS.GUIDE_STEP_2: Find the 'DNS Zone', 'DNS Zone Editor' or 'Manage DNS' section.
DNS.GUIDE_STEP_3: For each row in the table below, create a new record and copy the Name and Value exactly as shown (use the copy button).
DNS.GUIDE_STEP_4: Done! Now just wait. Verification usually takes a few minutes and can take up to 1 hour. You can leave this screen: the domain turns green on its own once it is confirmed.
DNS.SPF_HELP: This is a single TXT record. If you already send email from this domain, one probably already exists. In that case do not create another: edit the existing one and add include:amazonses.com.
DNS.SPF_EXAMPLE_BEFORE: If it looks like this today:
DNS.DMARC_HELP: Many domains already have DMARC. Check whether a _dmarc record already exists on your domain. If it does, you can skip this row.
DNS.AUTO_CHECKING: Checking on its own. It can take up to 1 hour. You can close this screen.
DNS.NAME: Name

CHECK.TITLE: Check result
CHECK.ALL_OK: All required records are correct. Now just wait for AWS to confirm (it can take up to 1 hour).
CHECK.HAS_ERRORS: Some records still need fixing. Fix the ones marked below and check again.
CHECK.STATUS_MISSING: Not found. It may still be propagating (wait a few minutes) or this record was not saved.
CHECK.STATUS_MISMATCH: Found, but the value is different. Check the Value and fix it.

FAILED.TITLE: We couldn't verify it yet
FAILED.BODY: This usually means a record was copied wrong, was saved in the wrong place (it must be where the domain is hosted), or was just added and hasn't propagated yet. Click Check now to see exactly which record needs fixing.

INBOX_SECTION.TITLE: Email campaigns
INBOX_SECTION.HELP: Verify this domain to send bulk campaigns from this inbox with good deliverability.
INBOX_SECTION.WARNING: Bulk campaigns go out through a separate high-volume channel. Verify this domain first. Without it, the domain can't be used for campaigns, and sending without proper authentication goes to spam or gets blocked.
INBOX_SECTION.VERIFIED: Domain verified. This inbox is ready to send campaigns.
INBOX_SECTION.NOT_CONFIGURED: The domain {domain} is not set up for campaigns yet.
INBOX_SECTION.WEBMAIL: Bulk campaigns can't be sent from {domain} — public webmail (Gmail, Outlook, Hotmail, etc.) can't be authenticated because you don't control its DNS, so it would be rejected as spoofing. Use your own domain (ideally a subdomain like news.yourcompany.com) to run campaigns. This inbox still works normally for 1:1 replies.

DIALOG.TITLE: Add sending domain
DIALOG.SUCCESS: Domain added. Paste the DNS records to finish verification.
DIALOG.ERROR: Could not add the domain. Please try again.

EMAIL_CAMPAIGN.DESCRIPTION: Compose an email, pick a verified sending domain, upload your recipient list and send now or schedule it.

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No email campaigns yet
EMPTY_STATE.SUBTITLE: Create your first campaign to compose and send an email to an imported list.

ACTIONS.DUPLICATE_SUCCESS: Campaign duplicated. Update the recipients and schedule.
ACTIONS.ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

DIALOG.SUBJECT_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Hi {'{{ nome }}'}, news from us
DIALOG.NO_VERIFIED_DOMAIN: No verified sending domain yet. Add and verify one under Email sending domains first.
DIALOG.DIRECT_WARNING: Heads up: this is your personal mailbox, not a bulk channel. Use it only for your own real, opted-in contacts and low volume — sending mass email from a free webmail account can get your account blocked or suspended. We cap it at 100/day and pace it like a human; for bigger lists, verify your own domain.
DIALOG.REPLY_TO_HINT: Replies go to this address; connect it as an inbox to turn replies into conversations.
DIALOG.ERROR: Could not save the campaign. Please try again.
DIALOG.FROM_EMAIL_INVALID: Enter a valid address at your verified domain
DIALOG.FROM_EMAIL_HINT: Must be an address {'@'}{domain} (your verified domain).
DIALOG.FROM_EMAIL_HINT_NO_DOMAIN: Must be an address at your verified sending domain.
DIALOG.PREHEADER_PLACEHOLDER: Short preview text shown after the subject
DIALOG.PREHEADER_HINT: Shown next to the subject in most inboxes.
DIALOG.BASE_HINT: Upload a CSV or XLSX with name + email columns. Detected columns become personalization placeholders.
DIALOG.BASE_IMPORT_ERROR: Could not import the list. The campaign was saved as a draft.

RECIPIENTS.TITLE: Recipients
RECIPIENTS.SUBTITLE: Upload a CSV or XLSX with name and email columns. Recipients are used only for this campaign and are not added to your contacts.
RECIPIENTS.UPLOAD_HINT: CSV or XLSX with name + email columns.
RECIPIENTS.EMPTY: No recipients yet. Upload a list to get started.
RECIPIENTS.IMPORT_ERROR: Could not import the list. Check the file format and columns.
RECIPIENTS.ADD_MORE_HINT: The list was uploaded when the campaign was created. Upload another CSV/XLSX to append more contacts.

PLACEHOLDERS.TITLE: Available placeholders
PLACEHOLDERS.SUBTITLE: Click a placeholder to copy it, then paste it into the subject, preheader or body.
PLACEHOLDERS.EMPTY: Import recipients to see the placeholders from your spreadsheet columns.

VALIDATION.TITLE: Pre-send check
VALIDATION.OK: All placeholders used in this campaign have values. Good to go.
VALIDATION.MISSING_LABEL: Used in the template but not found in the recipients:

BUILDER.SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the campaign, try again
BUILDER.SEND_TEST_ERROR: Could not send the test email
BUILDER.SAVE_TEMPLATE_ERROR: Could not save the template. Please try again.
BUILDER.SUBJECT_PLACEHOLDER: Email subject (the AI fills this in)

BLOCKS.EMPTY: Blocks will appear here once the editor is ready.

PROPS.TITLE: Properties
PROPS.EMPTY: Select a block to edit its style.

IMAGE.TITLE: Image
IMAGE.UPLOAD_ERROR: Could not upload the image. Please try again.
IMAGE.UPLOAD_TOO_LARGE: Image is too large. Use a file up to 10 MB.
IMAGE.UPLOAD_UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPG, GIF or WebP.
IMAGE.POSTER_ERROR: Could not fetch the video thumbnail. Check the link.

GENERATING.TITLE: Our AI is crafting the best email for your campaign ✨
GENERATING.BODY: We're polishing every detail — design, copy and your selling touches. Depending on how much polish it needs, this can take up to 5 minutes.
GENERATING.LEAVE: You can leave, I'll notify you
GENERATING.LEAVE_HINT: Feel free to keep working: we'll let you know and the email will be ready in your campaign, under the Editor button.
GENERATING.READY_BODY: We polished the design and copy based on your brief. Open it in the editor to review and tweak anything you want.
GENERATING.FAILED_BODY: Something went wrong while generating your email. Try again — or simplify the brief or remove heavy attachments.

TOAST.READY: ✨ The email for campaign "{name}" is ready! Open it in the editor to review.
TOAST.FAILED: Couldn't generate the email for campaign "{name}". Please try again.

COMPOSER.TITLE: Create with AI
COMPOSER.SUBTITLE: Describe the email you need and the AI will draft the subject, preheader and layout.
COMPOSER.BRIEF_PLACEHOLDER: E.g.: promotional email about the new auto insurance plan, friendly tone, discount call-to-action
COMPOSER.ADAPT_HINT: Keep this template's layout and structure; the AI only rewrites the copy and restyles to your brief. Uncheck to generate from scratch.
COMPOSER.ERROR: Could not generate the email. Please try again.
COMPOSER.NOT_CONFIGURED: Set up the CRM AI key in Connections to use this feature.
COMPOSER.BASE_TOO_LARGE: This template is too large to adapt. Uncheck "Adapt the current template" to generate from scratch.
COMPOSER.PLACEHOLDERS_HINT: The AI can personalize the email with these columns from your recipient list.
COMPOSER.ASSETS_HINT: Add images, a logo, a PDF or a video so the AI can use them. Tell the AI how each asset should be used.
COMPOSER.VIDEO_LINK_PLACEHOLDER: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL
COMPOSER.ASSET_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: What is this asset? E.g. customer testimonial video

BLOCK_ACTIONS.NO_TEXT: Select a block with text to improve.
BLOCK_ACTIONS.ERROR: Could not rewrite the text. Please try again.
BLOCK_ACTIONS.NOT_CONFIGURED: Set up the CRM AI key in Connections to use this feature.

WELCOME.TITLE: How do you want to start?
WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Pick a starting point. You can change everything later in the editor.
WELCOME.AI_SUBTITLE: Describe your campaign and let AI draft it using your contact list.
WELCOME.TEMPLATE_SUBTITLE: Start from a ready-made design and tweak it.
WELCOME.BLANK_SUBTITLE: Build your email block by block on a blank canvas.
